docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT STUBHUB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SURAJ RAJWANI. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STUBHUB'S REPRESENTATIVE STEFANIE TAMURA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,844.00 FILED BY RAJWANI, SURAJ AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAJWANI, SURAJ AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAJWANI, SURAJ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STUBHUB (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STUBHUB
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 10/24/16. PER U.S.POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
